claim_limits: The fixed 32-row cap returned no selection and is not widened.
All 32 exported DRAT files are the same two-byte, one-line empty-clause proof.

Pinned drat-trim prints an exact s VERIFIED line for every real-proof and empty-proof invocation; it exits 1 on 16 trivial-UNSAT paths, while the preregistered accepted-verification condition requires exit 0 plus the marker.
External clausal verification does not certify SMT-LIB source lowering.

selection.acceptance: proof >2 bytes and >1 line; real proof VERIFIED; empty proof over the same CNF not VERIFIED
selection.order: ascending content hash among expected-UNSAT rows
